message:
fix: replace silent u128-to-u64 truncation with saturating try_from

conformance/mod.rs advance_time and sync/contended_mutex.rs wait/hold
duration nanos used 'as u64' which silently truncates u128 from
Duration::as_nanos(). Use try_from().unwrap_or(u64::MAX) for
consistency with the pattern established in http/pool.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
